title: Don't crash if an image has no names
body:
When image is not tagged, we should just set the imageName to the
image.ID.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Should fix https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1499

@mheon I am not sure if we should set imageName=image.ID() or just leave it blank?
@pkubatrh could you try out this patch to see if it fixes your issue?

@rhatdan I think this is probably the right approach
LGTM
